ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bikes) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* Nearby landmarks of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the weather data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature (Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity (%) */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed (km/h) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (Autumn, Winter, Spring, Summer) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Holiday (True/False) */,
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather (e.g., partly-cloudy-day, rain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the rental occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "num_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes rented */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data for that day */,
  "rental_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the rental */,
  "rental_cost" REAL /* Cost of the rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_history" (
  "rental_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental history record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_history_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike is located */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., road, mountain) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the bike (e.g., good, bad) */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Manufacture date of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_rentals" (
  "bike_rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike rental */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the bike rental */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the bike rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparent_temperature" (
  "apparent_temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apparent temperature record */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data */,
  "apparent_temperature" REAL /* Apparent temperature (Celsius) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apparent_temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparent_temperature_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparent_temperature_past" (
  "apparent_temperature_past_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each past apparent temperature record */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data */,
  "apparent_temperature" REAL /* Past apparent temperature (Celsius) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apparent_temperature_past_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparent_temperature_past_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity record */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity (%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_past" (
  "humidity_past_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each past humidity record */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Past humidity (%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_past_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_past_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_survey" (
  "customer_survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer survey */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the survey */,
  "satisfaction_level" INTEGER /* Satisfaction level of the customer (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_survey_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_survey_questions" (
  "customer_survey_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer survey question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_survey_question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_survey_responses" (
  "customer_survey_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer survey response */,
  "customer_survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer survey */,
  "customer_survey_question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the survey question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_survey_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_survey_responses_customer_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_survey_id") REFERENCES customer_survey ("customer_survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_survey_responses_customer_survey_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_survey_question_id") REFERENCES customer_survey_questions ("customer_survey_question_id")
)
